subcodes.first_line: In truth, all must turn, in their contemplation, remembrance, utterance, humility, submissiveness, helplessness and supplication, unto the Divine Essence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه باید توجه و ذکر و بیان و خضوع و خشوع و عجز و ابتهال جمیع بکینونت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @personal instructions, @love of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
